issues.title: current live bucket CAUTION|base_caution_regime_or_bias|q35 exact support remains under minimum and remains the deployment blocker (19/50)
issues.action: 把 current-live blocker 語義切到 exact-support truth；在 current live bucket 補滿 minimum rows 前，不要把 proxy rows、reference patch、或 breaker 舊敘事誤當成已解除 blocker。
issues.next_action: 把 current-live blocker 語義切到 exact-support truth；在 current live bucket 補滿 minimum rows 前，不要把 proxy rows、reference patch、或 breaker 舊敘事誤當成已解除 blocker。

summary.deployment_blocker_reason: current live structure bucket 已有 exact rows，但仍低於 deployment-grade minimum support；在 support 補滿前，runtime 只能維持 guardrail，不可把這條 lane 視為已可部署。

issues.title: 建立 high-conviction top-k OOS ROI gate，讓 APP 從研究轉實戰
issues.action: 保留 high-conviction top-k 的 risk-first / nearest-deployable 排序；best_rows[] / nearest_deployable_rows[] 必須逐列帶 support_route、support_governance_route、deployment_blocker、runtime_closure_state、current_live_structure_bucket、current_live_structure_bucket_rows、minimum_support_rows、current_live_structure_bucket_gap_to_minimum。即時分桶 / 支持阻塞未解除前仍維持模擬觀察 / 影子驗證 / 僅觀察，不得把 OOS pass row 升級成 deployable；API summary 需先套用 fresh live_predict_probe support overlay 並重新計算 deployable_count / runtime_blocked_candidate_count / nearest_deployable_rows，不得沿用 artifact row 內過期 deployable_verdict。
issues.next_action: 保留 high-conviction top-k 的 risk-first / nearest-deployable 排序；best_rows[] / nearest_deployable_rows[] 必須逐列帶 support_route、support_governance_route、deployment_blocker、runtime_closure_state、current_live_structure_bucket、current_live_structure_bucket_rows、minimum_support_rows、current_live_structure_bucket_gap_to_minimum。即時分桶 / 支持阻塞未解除前仍維持模擬觀察 / 影子驗證 / 僅觀察，不得把 OOS pass row 升級成 deployable；API summary 需先套用 fresh live_predict_probe support overlay 並重新計算 deployable_count / runtime_blocked_candidate_count / nearest_deployable_rows，不得沿用 artifact row 內過期 deployable_verdict。

summary.strategy_lab_contract: Strategy Lab 必須優先顯示 nearest_deployable_rows，並把離線驗證 / 模型門檻失敗與即時分桶 / 支持阻塞分開呈現；此研究 gate 不暴露 live automation 按鈕。
summary.execution_contract: current-live blocker / unsupported support route keeps buy/add exposure fail-closed; reduce/sell diagnostics remain available
summary.api_contract: `/api/models/leaderboard.high_conviction_topk` exposes risk_qualified_count, runtime_blocked_candidate_count, nearest_deployable_rows, gate_failures/model_gate_failures/live_gate_failures, fail-closed status, and row-level support_route/support_governance_route/deployment_blocker/runtime_closure_state/current_live_structure_bucket; it applies fresh live_predict_probe support truth before row sorting/counts so stale artifact deployable_verdict cannot override a current-live blocker.
summary.strategy_lab_surface: Strategy Lab 高信心 OOS Top-K 部署門檻面板以操作員繁中 copy 顯示 walk-forward top-k OOS ROI、勝率、最大回撤、盈虧比、最差分折、交易數、部署判定與門檻失敗
summary.risk_first_sort_contract: deployment candidates are sorted by deployable/risk-qualified/runtime-blocked OOS-pass status before ROI, so high ROI rows with max_drawdown_too_high or worst_fold_negative cannot outrank cleaner nearest-deployable rows.

api_row_level_support_contract.live_overlay: fresh live_predict_probe support_context is applied before sorting/counts/compact rows; stale deployable rows are recomputed fail-closed when current-live support is under minimum or blocked

verify: source venv/bin/activate && PYTHONPATH=. python -m pytest tests/test_topk_walkforward_precision.py -q
source venv/bin/activate && python -m pytest tests/test_model_leaderboard.py tests/test_frontend_decision_contract.py -k high_conviction -q
Strategy Lab 高信心 OOS Top-K 部署門檻面板與 /api/models/leaderboard.high_conviction_topk 顯示 walk-forward top-k OOS matrix；即時分桶 / 支持阻塞未解除前仍 fail-closed，且 UI 使用操作員繁中 copy

source venv/bin/activate && python -m pytest tests/test_topk_walkforward_precision.py -k nearest_deployable -q && python -m pytest tests/test_model_leaderboard.py -k high_conviction_topk -q && python -m pytest tests/test_frontend_decision_contract.py -k high_conviction_topk_gate_contract -q

issues.title: q35 lane still needs formula review / base-stack redesign before deploy
issues.action: 把 q35 scaling audit 的 runtime gap / redesign entry_quality / allowed_layers 同步到 docs/probe/issues；本輪 discriminative redesign 只跨過 scoring floor，runtime gate/support 仍讓 allowed_layers=0，禁止把 score-only floor-cross 當成 deployment closure。
issues.next_action: 把 q35 scaling audit 的 runtime gap / redesign entry_quality / allowed_layers 同步到 docs/probe/issues；本輪 discriminative redesign 只跨過 scoring floor，runtime gate/support 仍讓 allowed_layers=0，禁止把 score-only floor-cross 當成 deployment closure。

summary.audit_recommended_action: discriminative base-stack redesign 只能讓 entry_quality 跨過 scoring floor，runtime gate/support 仍讓 allowed_layers=0；下一輪必須把它治理成 score-only / execution-blocked，不得把 floor-cross 當成 deployment closure。

issues.action: 保留 recent canonical drift 監控與 blocker-window evidence；目前 live predictor 沒有套用 recent pathology guardrail，且 current live regime 不等於 blocker dominant regime，因此降為 P1 監控，不得當成 deployment closure。
